_doc: Accuracy baseline for the CI gate. Edit only via PR; bump on each release tag. The reference numbers below were captured on the v3.7 prompt against the dev set (run_3_v3.7.json, 941 records). Test-set numbers will likely settle 1-3pp away from these; the floors are deliberately set ~3pp below dev so first real test run has room to breathe. After the first full nightly green-test run, the team should re-run check_accuracy.py --bump-baseline to switch to true test-set numbers.

by_store_floors._doc: Per-store overall floor (avg pct across the seven main fields: name/date/total_money/receipt_number/pos_id/cashier/product_name). Stores with n < 10 are excluded. Floors set ~3pp below observed v3.7 dev numbers so first real test-set run has breathing room.

ci_modes._doc: Tolerance scaling. Smoke = stack-gate.yml on PRs (smaller sample, more noise). Strict = full-eval.yml on nightly+release (full 400 records).
